comment.body:
I had to confess(and besides diversify this huge profit show parade)
May be I'm not alone and I guess a lot of people here just reading.
I have lost decent amount of trading stack in last couple of days :(
I didn't follow Alma signals. Why? Because signals are not part of the service ;)
Even I started to understand much much better then month ago, got info about relief rally to take lifeboat, but stepped in to long too early and on short side too.
I got that timing in this high vol period is more important then ever before.
But I'm still have optimisim and plans to do, what actually I can do - reread weekly/daily posts up to total understanding(still plenty room to go)
So what doesn't kill us makes us stronger
(Or I'm too stupid and gonna loss full speculation deposit)

comment.body:
I've been there. What I can suggest is to take a break from trading for a few days or weeks. Then get back to charts but without trading. Just to watch PA for few hours a day, reading Alma stuff. 
Then step in, slowly, smallest positions possible, a strategy, including SL and places for TP. Never against Alma. Even if she has 99 instead of 100% success rate - doing the opposite gives you that 1% chance and it's not looking good, is it. 
Keep that approach for a few months without breaking the rules. Cause if you do, there's a high chance you'll have to repeat the process.
